description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named rcc dev that runs daily at 05:00 UTC on the main branch and on push events to branches starting with 'cran-' or tags matching 'v*'. The workflow consists of three main jobs: matrix, check-matrix, and two jobs R-CMD-check-base and R-CMD-check-dev that run in parallel with a matrix strategy across different R packages. The jobs set up R environments, install dependencies, and run R CMD check.
